## CLI Tool

**Name:** <!-- e.g. Aider -->
**Repository / Website:** <!-- e.g. https://github.com/paul-gauthier/aider -->
**Install command:** <!-- e.g. pip install aider -->

<!-- What makes this tool valuable to CLISYS users? What unique capabilities does it bring? -->

## Capabilities

<!-- Which of these capabilities does the tool support? -->

- [ ] Code generation
- [ ] Code review
- [ ] Debugging
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation generation
- [ ] Other: 

## Interface Notes

<!-- How does the CLI tool accept input and produce output? Any special invocation flags? -->

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit the adapter PR
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] No, I'm just requesting it
